h : l ≤ n
⊢ (match l, n, h, φ with
    | _m, _n, _h, falsum => falsum
    | _m, _n, h, equal t₁ t₂ =>
      equal (Term.relabel (Sum.map id (Fin.castLE h)) t₁) (Term.relabel (Sum.map id (Fin.castLE h)) t₂)
    | _m, _n, h, rel R ts => rel R (Term.relabel (Sum.map id (Fin.castLE h)) ∘ ts)
    | _m, _n, h, f₁.imp f₂ =>
      (FirstOrder.Language.BoundedFormula.castLE h f₁).imp (FirstOrder.Language.BoundedFormula.castLE h f₂)
    | _m, _n, h, f.all => (FirstOrder.Language.BoundedFormula.castLE ⋯ f).all).IsPrenex
